body_html:
iOS App · Android App
Hey jeffrey,
We've put together a few reads that we really think will spark your curiosity today.

Here's some recommended reading to inspire you

Would You Live in a Shipping Container?
Curated by
Marcelle Sussman Fischler

Empty steel shipping containers, the kind stacked eight to ten high on cargo ships, are increasingly being used as building blocks for emergency housing following natural disasters, eco-friendly homes and multi-family dwellings.

Continue reading this
Here are a couple more reads we picked out to get your wheels turning

6 Catastrophic Effects of Global Warming Happening Right Now

Lauren Kelly

Great Gadgets for College Students

Patrick Weber

9 Portland Food Cart Dishes to Eat Right Now

Behind the Food Carts

Share your knowledge with others

With every bit you learn you can teach others. On learnist, we provide a platform that helps others share their knowledge. After all, the best way to learn is to teach others.


Share your knowledge

Try Learnist on your Android or iOS device

Don't want to receive email notifications? Adjust your message settings.

Hey jeffrey,
We've put together a few reads that we really think will spark your curiosity today.

Here's some recommended reading to inspire you

Animal Linguistics
Curated by
Brandon Whale

How do animals, other than humans, communicate? Can our species intercommunicate? This board explores animal language development, syntax, dialect, and vocalization.
Continue reading this
Here are a couple more reads we picked out to get your wheels turning

body_html:
iOS App · Android App
Hey jeffrey,
We've put together a few reads that we really think will spark your curiosity today.

Here's some recommended reading to inspire you

How to Solve a Rubik's Cube
Curated by
Jon Allen

Rubik's cube provides an easily accessible, hands on introduction to group theory. Learn about how you can use simple group theory to efficiently solve any Rubik's cube!
Continue reading this
Here are a couple more reads we picked out to get your wheels turning

How to Speed Read Like a Pro

Lauren Kelly

Top 10 Tricks to Increase iPhone 5 Battery Life

Farbood Nivi

8 Curious Stories Behind Well-Known Beatles Songs

Steve Webb

Share your knowledge with others

With every bit you learn you can teach others. On learnist, we provide a platform that helps others share their knowledge. After all, the best way to learn is to teach others.


Share your knowledge
